title: 5E6Rjfxk0Fvkss9Wnk811Q9R3K8O3K
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
China's retail sales in April grew year-on-year by only 2.3%, which is even lower than the 3.1% growth seen in March. Taking April's 0.3% inflation into account, China's retail sales adjusted for inflation grew year-on-year by only 2%, which marks the lowest growth seen since January 2023. China's retail sales growth has continued to decline from November's peak.
